headline: Citigroup Maintains Buy on Weyerhaeuser, Lowers Price Target to $30
summary: Citigroup  analyst Anthony Pettinari   maintains Weyerhaeuser (NYSE:WY) with a Buy and lowers the price target from $32 to $30.
